channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Russia Open To Talks With Europe, But With A "No Ultimatums" Condition

media:content.media:description: Putin has said that he is open to talks with European governments.

item.description: Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said common sense dictated the need for such contacts because of the "enormous number" of complex issues on the agenda, but he said the Europeans needed to change their approach to Russia.
item.content:encoded: Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said common sense dictated the need for such contacts because of the "enormous number" of complex issues on the agenda, but he said the Europeans needed to change their approach to Russia.

item.title: "Genocidal Death Cult": Araghchi Attacks Israel After 47 Killed In Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to renew their ceasefire, according to a US official

item.description: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to renew their ceasefire, according to a US official, after fresh violence in Lebanon put the fragile arrangement under pressure.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to renew their ceasefire, according to a US official, after fresh violence in Lebanon put the fragile arrangement under pressure.

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah Reach Ceasefire, But No Clarity on Lebanon's Occupied Areas

media:content.media:description: As per the IDF map, Israeli forces now occupy a 700 square km area of southern Lebanon.

item.description: Israel and Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah have reached a ceasefire agreement, a US official announced on Friday after an escalation in fighting in Lebanon threatened the chances of an interim agreement on ending the war in Iran.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah have reached a ceasefire agreement, a US official announced on Friday after an escalation in fighting in Lebanon threatened the chances of an interim agreement on ending the war in Iran.

item.title: "They're Finished. No Air Force, Navy, They Get No Money": Trump On Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: The US-Iran deal was signed this week.

item.description: The deal, signed this week by President Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart Masoud Pezeshkian, aims to end a conflict that began on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: The deal, signed this week by President Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart Masoud Pezeshkian, aims to end a conflict that began on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.

item.title: Strait Of Hormuz Traffic Highest In 2 Months, Thanks To US-Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: Iranian forces closed off the strait after US and Israeli strikes sparked the war on February 28.

item.description: A total of 25 commercial vessels crossed the newly reopened strait on Thursday, the highest number since mid-April, according to data from tracking firm AXSMarine.
item.content:encoded: A total of 25 commercial vessels crossed the newly reopened strait on Thursday, the highest number since mid-April, according to data from tracking firm AXSMarine.

item.title: US Needs $80 Billion For Iran War, Other Bills As Trump Faces Heat: Report

media:content.media:description: Pentagon leaders have said they risk running out of money for operations in the coming months.

item.description: President Donald Trump has faced backlash from Americans who accuse him of pouring billions of taxpayer dollars into the Middle East conflict while oil prices and inflation skyrocket in the United States.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump has faced backlash from Americans who accuse him of pouring billions of taxpayer dollars into the Middle East conflict while oil prices and inflation skyrocket in the United States.

item.title: "Unflinching Courage": Michelle Obama's Praise Moves Husband To Tears

media:content.media:description: Former President Barack Obama formally opened his presidential centre in Chicago on Thursday.

item.description: The Obamas and their daughters shared the stage with former presidents Joe Biden, George W Bush and Bill Clinton along with former first ladies Jill Biden, Laura Bush and Hillary Rodham Clinton.
item.content:encoded: The Obamas and their daughters shared the stage with former presidents Joe Biden, George W Bush and Bill Clinton along with former first ladies Jill Biden, Laura Bush and Hillary Rodham Clinton.

item.title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: Israel, Hezbollah Agree Ceasefire As US-Iran Deal Under Strain

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US and Iran signed the deal digitally.

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: When Shah Met Gor: Drug-Terror Nexus And New Urgency In India-US Ties

media:content.media:description: Shah is not a minister who keeps an open calendar for ambassadorial visits or foreign delegations

item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah is not a minister who keeps an open calendar for ambassadorial visits or foreign delegations. His engagement with foreign envoys is deliberate, rare, and almost always calibrated to a specific security imperative.
item.content:encoded: Union Home Minister Amit Shah is not a minister who keeps an open calendar for ambassadorial visits or foreign delegations. His engagement with foreign envoys is deliberate, rare, and almost always calibrated to a specific security imperative.

item.title: Talks With US Bound By Tehran's Red Line: Iran's Ghalibaf

media:content.media:description: It remains unclear when talks for a final settlement will start.

item.description: Tehran and Washington signed a memorandum of understanding this week ending a regional war that erupted on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: Tehran and Washington signed a memorandum of understanding this week ending a regional war that erupted on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.

item.title: 'Submit Transit Request 48 Hours In Advance': Iran To Ships Crossing Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Traffic through Strait of Hormuz has picked up

item.description: The Iranian maritime authority's statement comes despite the Strait of Hormuz reopening after a US-Iran agreement to end the war.
item.content:encoded: The Iranian maritime authority's statement comes despite the Strait of Hormuz reopening after a US-Iran agreement to end the war.

item.title: Manchester To 10 Downing: Andy Burnham Eyes Bid To Be UK Prime Minister

media:content.media:description: Burnham was born and raised in a pocket of northwest England between Liverpool and Manchester.

item.description: Andy Burnham is expected to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer after winning a seat in Parliament in a special election he hailed as a "turning point" for UK politics.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham is expected to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer after winning a seat in Parliament in a special election he hailed as a "turning point" for UK politics.

item.title: "Italy And I Never Beg": Meloni Fumes After Trump's Photo Claim

media:content.media:description: Meloni dismissed Trump's comments and said that she was "astonished" by them

item.description: While speaking to an Italian media outlet, US President Donald Trump said that he did not "have to" talk to Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and that she was "probably happy" that he spoke to her.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115485/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>While speaking to an Italian media outlet, US President Donald Trump said that he did not "have to" talk to Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and that she was "probably happy" that he spoke to her.

item.title: Israel, Hezbollah Have Agreed To Ceasefire: Report

media:content.media:description: US, Israel have agreed to start a ceasefire after Israeli strikes killed 21.

item.description: Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to a ceasefire set to begin at 4 pm local time on Friday, a senior US official told Reuters.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to a ceasefire set to begin at 4 pm local time on Friday, a senior US official told Reuters.

item.title: Trump Asked Which World Leader He Admires Most, He Picks PM Modi, Xi Jinping

media:content.media:description: In the Axios interview, Trump repeatedly assessed power in terms of submission.

item.description: Donald Trump made the remarks on "The Axios Show" on Thursday, shortly after returning from a G7 summit in France that he described as "very dominant".
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump made the remarks on "The Axios Show" on Thursday, shortly after returning from a G7 summit in France that he described as "very dominant".

item.title: Meet 'The Gentlemen': The Ransomware Gang Offering Hackers A 90% Cut

media:content.media:description: The Gentlemen's rise says a lot about the evolution of cybercrime.

item.description: Modern ransomware groups operate more like multinational businesses. They recruit talent, offer incentives, provide customer support to affiliates and compete aggressively for market share.
item.content:encoded: Modern ransomware groups operate more like multinational businesses. They recruit talent, offer incentives, provide customer support to affiliates and compete aggressively for market share.

item.title: "Dagnabbit, We Got Hormuzled": Jimmy Kimmel Prods Trump On Iran Deal
item.description: Donald Trump's behavior at the G7 Summit drew criticism and ridicule from late-night hosts and politicians alike.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's behavior at the G7 Summit drew criticism and ridicule from late-night hosts and politicians alike.

item.title: 194-Year-Old Tortoise Becomes World's Oldest Known Land Animal

media:content.media:description: Jonathan is also known for celebrating his birthday with a vegan cake.

item.description: Experts are also studying Jonathan's DNA because his cells do not appear to mutate in the same way as human cells.
item.content:encoded: Experts are also studying Jonathan's DNA because his cells do not appear to mutate in the same way as human cells.

item.title: Ratings Pressure, Israel Rift: Why Trump Signed 'Unequal' Iran Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: The deal provides Iran with economic breathing space and could reduce US' leverage in future

item.description: As sanctions begin to ease and economic pressure on Iran diminishes, the next phase of negotiations will determine whether Washington can secure meaningful and lasting nuclear restrictions or whether Tehran emerges with even greater bargaining power.
item.content:encoded: As sanctions begin to ease and economic pressure on Iran diminishes, the next phase of negotiations will determine whether Washington can secure meaningful and lasting nuclear restrictions or whether Tehran emerges with even greater bargaining power.

item.title: 18 Dead In Israeli Strikes On Lebanon As US-Iran Talks Pushed Back

media:content.media:description: Benjamin Netanyahu has refused to withdraw, saying Israeli forces will remain in Lebanon

item.description: Lebanon's state-run National News Agency reported at least 16 people were killed in Israeli airstrikes, which the Israeli military said were ongoing.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115293/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Lebanon's state-run National News Agency reported at least 16 people were killed in Israeli airstrikes, which the Israeli military said were ongoing.
